CustomMetadata.label: AA-003 - Hardcoded credentials in Apex c

values.value: Hardcoded credentials in Apex class bodies

One or more Apex class bodies contain patterns matching hardcoded credentials: password=, apiKey=, token=, secret=, privateKey=, or client_secret= followed by a non-empty quoted value. This is a heuristic check - manual code review required to confirm.
Hardcoded credentials in Apex are visible to anyone with View Setup permission or access to the Apex source. Credentials committed to version control are permanently exposed even after removal.
Remove all hardcoded credentials immediately. Store secrets in Named Credentials (OAuth2), Custom Settings with restricted CRUD/FLS, or an external secrets manager accessible via Named Credentials.
